eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Island; King; Pierce; Snohomish; Jefferson; Kitsap, WA; at 01:30 PM ON MAR 2, 2026 Effective until 04:30 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test, only a test, of the Emergency Alert System, from the Island County Department of Emergency Management.  In the event of an actual emergency, this system would bring you important Information.
